3.
Consider
the
relationship
between
temperature
measured
in
degrees
Celsius
(°C)
and degrees
Fahrenheit
(°F), which is
given k
by
C=aF +b
b. Find a a
and b, given
that ice melts at 0 degrees
Celsius
and 32 degrees
Fahrenheit, and
boils at 100 degrees
water
Celsius
and
212 degrees
Fahrenheit.
